title: xanthobrychis ptolemaica
intro: Xanthobrychis ptolemaica, also known as Ptolemaic yellow clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Xanthobrychis ptolemaica is often combined with other plants or used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to leverage its medicinal properties.
